promo_headline: Monday hits the gas — Replit, Notion, and a Shopify push.

digest.title: Monday is a launch day, not a meeting day.
digest.body: Three product launches and two pricing moves all land before lunch. Replit Agents v2, Notion 4, and Shopify Sidekick are the headliners; underneath, Stripe and OpenAI both tweak how they price what you already pay for. Buyers should re-check their bills this afternoon.

items.headline: Replit Agents v2 launches with a single-pane runner
items.deck: Replit shipped Agents v2 with a unified runner and per-step approval. This matters because Replit is the cleanest reference UI for agent runs and competitors will copy within a month.
items.image_alt: L'Arlésienne: Madame Joseph-Michel Ginoux (Marie Julien, 1848–1911) — Vincent van Gogh (1888–89)

items.headline: Notion AI becomes Notion 4
items.deck: Notion renamed its AI tier to Notion 4, with new workspace-level summarization. This matters because Notion is where most company knowledge already lives, so workspace-level AI features start touching real work.

items.headline: Shopify Sidekick learns a sales mode
items.deck: Shopify Sidekick added a sales-rep mode that drafts follow-ups from store data. This matters because SMB merchants now get an AI sales motion without a separate CRM.
items.image_alt: Philip IV (1605–1665), King of Spain — Velázquez (Diego Rodríguez de Silva y Velázquez) (probably 1624)

items.headline: Stripe Atlas bundles AI bookkeeping
items.deck: Stripe added an AI bookkeeping line item to Atlas with a free first year. This matters because bookkeeping is the most under-loved problem in founder ops and Stripe just made it default.

items.headline: OpenAI quietly simplifies its pricing page
items.deck: OpenAI removed three legacy tiers from the public pricing page and consolidated them into Heavy and Instant. This matters because pricing simplification is usually a precursor to a margin move at the top end.
items.image_alt: Anchorage on a rainy night — Shen Zhou (dated 1477)

items.headline: Re-cost your AI line items in the team budget.
items.why: Stripe and OpenAI both moved pricing this morning; today's reconciliation is cheaper than next month's surprise.
items.try: Set a 30-min timer. Pull the last two invoices, compare against new pricing, flag any change >10%.
items.image_alt: L'Arlésienne: Madame Joseph-Michel Ginoux (Marie Julien, 1848–1911) — Vincent van Gogh (1888–89)

items.headline: Try Replit Agents v2 on a real chore.
items.why: Agents-v2 launch day is the moment to lock in your mental model before everyone has hot takes.
items.try: Set a 30-min timer. Pick a chore (rename files, add type hints, scaffold a test). Run it. Note where you intervened.
